sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_tuples (id UInt32, nums Tuple(Int32, Int32, Int32), divisors Tuple(Int32, Int32, Int32));
SELECT id, tupleIntDivOrZero(nums, divisors) AS results FROM test_tuples;
UPDATE test_tuples SET divisors = (1, 0, 4) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, tupleIntDivOrZero(nums, divisors) AS updated_results FROM test_tuples;
